sdesc: Building Android applications with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose — including JWT-based authentication, Retrofit/WebSocket API integration, Dagger Hilt for dependency injection, and M-Pesa/PayPal payment integration.
Designing and optimizing databases across SQL Server (T-SQL), PostgreSQL, and Firebase Firestore — writing stored procedures, triggers, and handling backup and recovery operations.
Configuring and troubleshooting TCP/IP networks, DHCP, and subnetting, plus supporting virtualization environments and POS hardware — hands-on experience from my ICT internship at GFL.
Working with Microsoft Dynamics NAV / Business Central and the C/SIDE development environment to support enterprise workflows and system integrations.
Designing RESTful APIs and integrating third-party services for real-time data sync, secure communication, and cross-platform functionality.
Applying TensorFlow and Keras fundamentals to practical data problems — currently expanding this into production-grade AI/ML work.
